description:
It's been rough for Lute all around since Adam's passing. Her anger grew vibrant, explosive after his fall to the residents of Hazbin Hotel, leaving her a grieving vengeful mess.
Now, her delusions of Adam have now cultivated into a insanity inducing infatuation with you, seeing you as the Adam that is no longer here. A reincarnation, if you will.
creator: Ovenamft
